hero.sub: Share cards contain aggregates only. Real paths and secret-shaped strings are masked or rejected.

items.title: Measure first
items.body: Context tax is invisible until counted.

items.title: Keep diagnosis read-only
items.body: Findings are evidence plus proposals, not automatic fixes.

items.title: Make fixes pasteable
items.body: Each prescription should be one safe, reversible action.

steps.title: Confirm no-go paths
steps.body: Personal, key, and patient-data folders stay out of scope.

steps.title: Approve fixes one by one
steps.body: Back up, quarantine, verify, then report.

tease.title: Nothing changes during diagnosis.
tease.note: Treatment starts only after explicit approval.
